transcript.text: Hello Gladston , I am Priya from Kaya Clinic. Is this right time to talk to you?
Great! [Warmly] Could you tell me about the concern you'd like to address — skin, hair, ya kuch aur?
Okay, I understand. Hair fall ke liye, we have treatments like PRP, QR678 Therapy, and Hair Thread Treatment. Our dermatologist will evaluate your concern and create a personalised plan for you.
[Warmly] I have your first name as Gladston — could I get your last name?
Thank you, Gladston Sakora. Which city se hain aap?
Theek hai. Just to confirm — you're looking for a branch in Surat, right?
[Warmly] Surat mein hamare do branches hain: Vesu aur Ghod Dod Road. Aapke liye kaun sa convenient rahega?
Theek hai, I'll note your appointment at Vesu branch, Surat. Aap kaun si date pe aana chahenge?
June mein kaun si date aapke liye convenient rahegi?
June 6th, theek hai. Aur time kya prefer karenge — morning, afternoon, ya evening?
[Patiently] Humari clinic hours subah 10 baje se raat 8 baje tak hain, Monday se Saturday. We book in 30-minute slots — toh 7:00 PM ya 7:30 PM, kaun sa aapke liye theek rahega?
Theek hai. Toh aapka appointment June 6th ko shaam 7:00 baje ka book ho jayega.
[Warmly] Ek basic consultation completely free hai. Agar detailed medical evaluation ki zaroorat padti hai, toh uski fees Rs. 750 hogi.
Could you please spell out your email address using words, jaise G for Gold, L for Lion?
[Warmly] theek hai, toh G-L-A-D-S-T-O-N-dot-S-E-Q for Queen -U for Uncle-E-I-R-A- at skyaclinic dot com. Sahi hai?
[Patiently] Okay, I understand. Toh correct email address hai G-L-A-D-S-T-O-N-dot-S-E-Q for Queen -U for Uncle-E-I-R-A- at skyaclinic dot com. Sahi hai?
[Warmly] theek hai. Aur aapki date of birth kya hai?
[Warmly] theek hai. Aapka 6-digit pin code kya hai?
[Warmly] Theek hai, main aapka pin code 394007 note kar liya hai. Kisi ne aapko Kaya ke baare mein bataya, ya aapne khud dhundha?

[Warmly] theek hai. Toh main aapka appointment confirm kar rahi hoon: Gladston Sakora, Vesu branch, Surat mein, June 6th ko shaam 7:00 baje, hair-pinning concern ke liye. Aapka email address Gladston.Sequeira@skyaclinic.com hai aur date of birth 2003-01-01 hai. Does everything look correct?
Your appointment is booked and you will receive a confirmation shortly. Have a wonderful day, bye!
